en.name: Level 19 — Attic Floorboards
en.shortDescription: A dilapidated attic of dusty furniture and boxes, with an alluring orange glow under the floorboards that alters memory and rots matter.
en.atmosphere: Musty and oppressive clutter of vintage items; a warm inviting glow feigns comfort while eroding the mind.
en.tips: Avoid prolonged exposure to the orange glow. Items decay fast once removed from containers. Expect hallucinations and memory loss.
